channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: US skier Lauren Macuga wins downhill portion of new team combined event at world championships
item.description: American skier Lauren Macuga has posted the fastest time in the downhill portion of the new team combined event at the Alpine skiing world championships in Saalbach-Hinterglemm, Austria.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Aaliyah Edwards shocks Breanna Stewart 12-0 in opening round of Unrivaled 1-on-1 tournament
item.description: Aaliyah Edwards pulled off the stunner of the opening round of the Unrivaled 1-on-1 tournament beating top-seeded Breanna Stewart 12-0. The tournament that will be played over three days featured 23 of the league's 36 players. A few had other commitments and a couple others were out with injuries.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fox projects the Super Bowl averaged a record 126 million U.S. viewers
item.description: Fox Sports is projecting a Super Bowl record average audience of 126 million U.S. viewers across television and streaming platforms for Philadelphia’s 40-22 victory over Kansas City.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sidney Crosby says he's good to go for Canada at 4 Nations after missing Penguins games with injury
item.description: BROSSARD, Quebec (AP) — After missing Pittsburgh's final two games before the NHL break for the 4 Nations Face-Off, Sidney Crosby took part in Canada's first practice Monday and declared himself good to go.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Timberwolves sale to Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez back on track after arbitration ruling
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The ownership transfer of the Minnesota Timberwolves must continue as originally planned, after a three-person arbitration panel ruled 2-1 that controlling owner Glen Taylor must cede control of the NBA club to partners Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez in the disputed final phase of t
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Simone Biles, Jane Fonda and Brittney Griner headline women’s conference in San Jose
item.description: The one-day annual event will feature keynote speeches and as well as panel discussions and other events related to issues 'connection, motivation, inspiration and skill-building' for women of all ages and at all stages of their careers.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Super Bowl halftime performer detained after 'Gaza' flag display
item.description: A performer in Kendrick Lamar's halftime show was detained after displaying a flag with the words "Sudan" and "Gaza"
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Brewers unveil patch they will wear on their uniforms to honor Bob Uecker
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Milwaukee Brewers have unveiled a patch they will wear on their uniform this season to honor longtime broadcaster Bob Uecker, who died last month. The patch will appear on the sleeve of the Brewers’ uniforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl losers' merch passed to other nations
item.description: The NFL plans for both outcomes so they're ready regardless of who wins. What that inevitably means is a whole lot of merchandise that's pre-printed and pre-made – but fans won't ever be able to buy it.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Did you know? The flag presented during the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX came from Utah
item.description: The flag presented during the performance of the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX was handmade by a Utah-based flag company.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Photos: President Trump arrives at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.description: In addition to the history that may be made on the field, the U.S. will see a first during Super Bowl LIX: a sitting president will be in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego family shows off their Chiefs pride ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: Thousands of miles from Kansas City, Chiefs fans in San Diego are rallying together to show their unwavering support ahead of the Super Bowl, proving distance can't dampen their passion.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: Radek Faksa scores in the 10th round of the shootout to give Blues a 6-5 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Radek Faksa scored in the 10th round of the shootout to give the St. Louis Blues a 6-5 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: He's back, baby! ESPN's Dick Vitale makes return to commentating following 4th bout with cancer
item.description: ESPN’s Dick Vitale received a standing ovation Saturday night at Clemson’s Littlejohn Coliseum in his first game back as a commentator since recovering from his fourth bout with cancer.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James will sit out the Lakers' game against Indiana to rest his sore left ankle
item.description: LeBron James is sitting out the Los Angeles Lakers ' game against Indiana on Saturday to rest his sore left ankle.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Clippers to sign former top pick Ben Simmons: report
item.description: A former No. 1 overall pick in the NBA Draft has found a new home in Los Angeles. The L.A. Clippers are expected to sign three-time All Star Ben Simmons as a free agent when he clears waivers, according to ESPN's Shams Charania.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Vucevic and the Bulls take on Curry and the Warriors
item.description: Golden State Warriors (25-25, 11th in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (22-30, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Bulls host the Golden State Warriors in out-of-conference play on Saturday. The Bulls are 10-16 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks visit the Blues after Donato's 2-goal performance
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (17-31-6, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (24-26-5, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 7 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Blues -250, Blackhawks +203; over/under is 5.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks visit the St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NFL has no plans to end DEI practices, commissioner says
item.description: The NFL is committed to sticking to its DEI policies despite a change in its Super Bowl on-field messaging campaign
item.dc:creator: Libbey Dean, NewsNation

item.title: Jimmy Butler headed to Golden State, Andrew Wiggins to Miami, AP source says
item.description: Jimmy Butler got what he wanted. He's being traded out of Miami and got a new contract in the process. The Heat and the Golden State Warriors have agreed on a deal that sends Butler to the Bay Area, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Madsen brothers lead Utes past Colorado, 72-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Lawson Lovering scored 12 points and Utah kept Colorado winless in the Big 12 beating the Buffaloes 72-59 on Wednesday night. Ezra Ausar and reserve Mason Madsen each scored 10 points for the Utes (13-9, 5-6 Big 12).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Bulls, Ball agree to contract extension
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bulls and point guard Lonzo Ball have agreed to a two-year contract extension, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Charania reports the deal is worth $20 million over two years.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: USU hits 20-win mark with 71-67 victory at Wyoming
item.description: LARAMIE, Wyo. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its most disappointing performance of the season, a 19-point loss at home to New Mexico, the Utah State basketball rebounded nicely with a hard-fought 71-67 victory at Wyoming Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: SDFC completes Sharp Healthcare Performance Center on Sycuan land
item.description: Almost three years in the making, San Diego FC’s Sharp Healthcare Performance Center is now complete.
item.dc:creator: Julian Del Gaudio, Fox 5

item.title: 70 Illinois residents can win Las Vegas vacation with Rosati's Pizza
item.description: Illinois residents can enter the Rosati's Pizza sweepstakes and win a three-day, two-night vacation at the Circa Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, with the contest closing on the day of the Big Game.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Cooper Kupp says the Rams intend to trade him. He's disappointed to end his 8 years with the team
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Receiver Cooper Kupp says the Los Angeles Rams are attempting to trade him after eight seasons with the club, and he doesn't like the decision.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Major League Baseball fires ump amid gambling probe
item.description: Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, WGN 9
